title: Squidward's Clarinet
description:
Squidward's clarinet is now in minecraft!
A new musical weapon that adds new mechanics and fun!
body:
![A picture with the title "clarinet"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49e846bc022847afac03acb02f4b83bc8478fc24.png)


What kind of mod is this?
---
New musical weapon - "clarinet". 
With this instrument you can freeze mobs and players!

How to use a musical weapon?
- Press `RMB` and the normal attack will begin (5 s)
- Press `Shift + RMB` to perform an ult for an additional 5 seconds (10 s)

There can be many mistakes in fashion. We don't know how many. So be prepared for surprises 

Craft
---
![Making a clarinet on a workbenc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e0cb160510fa802bb8b4643cae8313150753a6c.png)
- Two quartz
- Two buttons
- One music device

Questions
---
Will the mod be on older versions?
- There are issues with this, but we think it will be available in older versions soon

Will there be a mod on the Fabric?
- Probably not, because we don't know how to work with fabric

Developers
---
Wardni: model, texture

CHOMMI: code, mechanics
